name: alsa-ucm-conf
title: alsa-ucm-conf
summary: ALSA Use Case Manager configuration files
description:
ALSA Use Case Manager configuration files
This package contains ALSA Use Case Manager configuration of audio
input/output names and routing for specific audio hardware. They can be
used with the alsaucm tool.
.
Installing these configuration files is absolutely necessary to make some
sound hardware work. Its installation is highly recommended in order to
use ALSA-backed hardware.
.
ALSA is the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture.
